method: Inspected application Drawing Review UI screenshots side-by-side: same-name reference drawing on the left, generated drawing on the right.

visual_findings: Reference uses long horizontal views plus a right-side small view and isometric view; generated layout does not preserve that structure.
Generated drawing contains title block or drawing frame geometry inside the drawing area.
Dimension placement and technical note placement differ materially from the reference.
cases.recommended_fix: Preserve the reference long-thin view slots and keep the title block/frame outside the model view area before rerunning CAD generation.

visual_findings: Generated view scale and placement do not match the compact reference layout.
Large title block/frame lines intrude into the right-hand generated drawing area.
Dimension annotation style and density do not match the reference drawing.
cases.recommended_fix: Reduce generated frame/title geometry intrusion, align the three-view/isometric layout to the reference, and regenerate dimensions from the reference style.

visual_findings: Reference emphasizes a plate top view, bottom thin view, and a red machining note; generated drawing changes the view arrangement.
Generated drawing adds or relocates side/isometric views compared with the reference composition.
Reference warning/note style is not reproduced, and frame/title elements appear in the main drawing region.
cases.recommended_fix: Treat the red reference note and plate-view layout as hard visual style inputs, then rerun layout and notes placement.

visual_findings: Generated front/side/isometric view proportions and positions differ from the reference.
Title block/frame linework intrudes into the generated drawing's model area.
Reference dimension cluster style is not reproduced in the generated drawing.
cases.recommended_fix: Anchor circular-part view positions to the same-name reference and prevent title block linework from being included in the preview/model area.

visual_findings: Reference is a dense machined-plate drawing with many hole and contour dimensions; generated drawing is under-dimensioned.
Generated main view is too small and does not preserve the reference dimension density.
Title block/table linework occupies a large portion of the drawing area.
cases.recommended_fix: Raise feature/hole dimension extraction coverage for dense machined plates and reserve sheet title/table regions before view placement.

visual_findings: Reference contains complete multi-view dimensions; generated drawing lacks most visible blue dimension annotations.
Generated views are roughly similar in type but not in scale, position, or dimension coverage.
Title block/table linework appears inside the generated drawing area and reduces usable drawing space.
cases.recommended_fix: Keep the reference multi-view layout, restore full dimension coverage, and exclude title/table geometry from the model comparison area.
